category_sources: Official GitHub README identifies Dynamips as a Cisco Router Emulator.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is "Dynamips (Cisco Router Emulator)".
docs_sources: Official GNS3 docs document Cisco IOS images for Dynamips and explain Dynamips use in GNS3.
Official GitHub README says to see the README for how to use Dynamips.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/GNS3/dynamips; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official GNS3 documentation says Dynamips emulates Cisco hardware and runs IOS images.
